---
title: "Skills"
---

<script type="text/javascript">
 function showhide(id) {
    var e = document.getElementById(id);
    e.style.display = (e.style.display == 'block') ? 'none' : 'block';
 }
</script>

<style>

</style>

## Data Science

* R, Rmd and RStudio     
  Packages include:
  + tidyverse
    - ggplot 2 
    - dplyr
    - tidyr
    - readr
    - purr 
    - tibble
    - stringr
    - forcats
  + knitr
  + reticulate
  + lubridate
  + dygraphs
  + sf (simple features)
  + leaflet
  + devtools
  + downloader
  + pagedown
  + pacman
  + installer
  + blogdown
  + mosaic
* Python and Jupyter Notebook     
  Libraries include:
  + Pandas
  + Matplotlib
  + Numpy
  + Plotly
  + Math
  + Tensor Flow
  + SciPy
* SQL 
  + Oracle
  + MySQL
* Tableau
* Spreadsheets
  + Excel 
  + Google Sheets
* Data Management
  + Intuition
  + Insight 
  + Wrangling 
  + Visualization
  + Exploration
  + Consulting
  + Mining
* Statistics
  Tests include:
  + t test
  + Wilcox
  + ANOVA
  + Kruskal-Wallis
  + Linear and Logistic Regression
  + Chi-Squared
  + Permutation and Randomization
* Machine Learning
  Algorithms include:
  + Classifiers
  + Clustering
  + Decision Trees
  + K-Nearest Neighbors
  + Neural Networks

## Computer Engineering

* Embedded Programming and Systems
  + C/C++ 
  + Python
  + Assembly
  + Machine code
  + Register-level C 
  + Simulink
* Embedded Operating Systems
  + ROS (Robot Operating System)
  + VxWorks
  + FreeRTOS 
  + Real-Time Linux
  + Embedded Linux
  + Raspberry OS (Raspian)
  + Windows IOT
* Digital Systems
  + HDL 
    - Verilog
    - VHDL
  + FPGA 
    - Artix 7
    - Kintex 7
    - PolarFire
  + Simulation
    - Verilog Test Bench
    - Logisim
  + Logic Integrated Circuits  
* Internet of Things
  + Communications
  + Information
  + Fourier Series and Transform
  + Filters
* Circuit Analysis
  + LTspice Software
  + Transistors, Diodes, and Op-Amps
    - MOSFETS
    - BJT
  + Basic Circuits
    - Inductors
    - Capacitors 
    - Resistors
  + Methods and Techniques
    - Node
    - Mesh

## Web Development

<ul>

  <li>HTML</li>
  <li>CSS</li>

  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('JS')"><li>JavaScript</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 21/25</span>
  </span></div>
</ul>  


### R-based webpages

* Basic knitr    
  Basic building blocks:
  - knitr (R package)
  - _site.yml
  - index.Rmd
* Blogdown    
  Basic building blocks:
  - blogdown (R package)
  - config.toml
  - index.Rmd
<!-- * Bookdown     -->
<!--   Basic building blocks: -->
<!--   - bookdown (R package) -->
<!--   - config.toml -->
<!--   - index.Rmd   -->
* Pagedown    
  Basic building blocks:
  - pagedown (R package and templates)
  - knitr (R package)
  - Rmarkdown
  
## Mathematics

<ul>

  <li>Functional Programming</li><ul>
    <li>MATLAB</li>
    <li>Mathematica</li>
    <li>Elisp</li>
    <li>Erlang</li>
    <li>Python</li></ul>
  <li>Discrete Math</li>
  <li>Differential Calculus</li>
  <li>Linear Algebra</li>


  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('math')"><li>Basic Math</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
  </span></div>
</ul>  

## General Programming

<ul>

  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('C++')"><li>C/C++</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
  </span></div>
  
  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Java')"><li>Java</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 22/25</span>
  </span></div>
  
  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Python')"><li>Python</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
  </span></div>

  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <li>Types</li><ul>
    <li>Scripting</li>
    <li>Functional</li>
    <li>Logical</li>
    <li>Procedural</li>
    <li>Object-Oriented</li>
    <li>Data Structures and Algorithms</li><ul>
      <li>Arrays and Lists</li>
      <li>Sorts</li>
      <li>Trees</li>
      <li>Heaps</li>
      <li>Hash Tables</li>
      <li>Queue</li>
  </ul></ul></div>
  
  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <li>Methodologies</li><ul>
    <li>Design</li>
    <li>Develop</li>
    <li>Test</li>
    <li>Debug</li>
  </ul></div>

</ul>  
  
## Operating Systems

* Linux
  + Ubuntu
  + Fedora
  + Crouton
  + Debian
* Chrome OS
* Microsoft Windows
  + Office 365
  + Active Directory
* Command lines 
  + Bash
  + Batch
  <!-- + Powershell -->
  + Windows Task Scheduler

## Cloud Computing

* Git
  + Github
  + Bash
* Google Cloud
  + Drive
  + Colab

## Industry Knowledge

* Technical Communication
* Human Relations
* Teaching 
* Research
  + Scientific 
  + Computational
  + Security
  + Market 
  + Data
* Project Management
  + Agile
  + Scrum
  + Waterfall
  + Kanban Board
    - Trello
    - Jira
* Security  
  + Social Engineering
  + Cryptography
  + Data and Networks 
  + Authentication, Access and Accounts
  + Binary Analysis
